taskTitle: Memorise the hadith of Jibril (Sahih Muslim 8) on Islam, Iman, and Ihsan
subtaskTitle: Read the full hadith text in Arabic and English
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Read the full hadith text in Arabic and English' under the parent task 'Memorise the hadith of Jibril (Sahih Muslim 8) on Islam, Iman, and Ihsan' (module: faith_shahada_core), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: What are the primary ayat, such as Surah An-Najm 53:3-4 and Surah Al-Hashr 59:7, that establish the divine inspiration and binding authority of the Prophet's teachings, contextually anchoring the necessity of reading and preserving his exact words?

Which authentic narrations, specifically the primary text found in Sahih Muslim 8 and its variant in Sahih al-Bukhari 50, provide the complete Arabic and English transcriptions of the Hadith of Jibril detailing Islam, Iman, and Ihsan?
